[[9 BBY/Legends|9]]–[[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]]<ref name="PLDDate">"[[The Princess Leia Diaries]]" begins Approx. ten [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the birth of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], and ends during her ascension to the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]], which ''[[Children of the Jedi]]'' dates to Approx. 18 years after her birth. According to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', Organa's birth occurred in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], ten years before [[9 BBY/Legends|9 BBY]] and 18 years before [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]]. Therefore, "The Princess Leia Diaries" spans the period between these two years.</ref>

"'''The Princess Leia Diaries'''" is a short comic written by [[Jason Hall]] that appeared in ''[[Star Wars Tales 11]]'' and was collected in ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 3]]''.

==Plot summary==
Using excerpts from her diary, the story follows the experiences of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Princess Leia Organa]] as a young girl as she grows up in a high class society. It gives an insight to her rebellious nature and how her relationship with her adopted father, [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Prince Bail]], sets her on the path against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It begins when she is ten years old where she complains about not being able to be herself. It continues through her young life where she exhibits all her funny pranks. The story continues to the point where she becomes the [[Senator/Legends|senator]] of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]].

==Continuity==
The incident where Leia drops a water balloon on [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Tarkin's]] head is referred to in Jason Hall's later ''Star Wars Tales'' story "[[The Other (comic story)|The Other]]."

Though not identified in the comic itself, the redhead in Tarkin's airspeeder was identified as [[Natasi Daala]] on [[TheForce.net]] forums.<ref name="Daala">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6136614|board=Literature|thread=Tales #11 (spoilers)|user=[[Jason Hall|Nerf-Lover]]|date=2002-03-22|time=8:16 AM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200802160301/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/tales-11-spoilers.6101896/page-2}}</ref>
